note: FERRYMAN out-of-tree SUBSTRATE manifest (QC 2026-07-13, D-08/D-10). These live OUTSIDE FERRYMAN_HOME (default C:\llama.cpp, C:\models, C:\whisper.cpp; override with FERRYMAN_LLAMA_DIR / FERRYMAN_GGUF_DIR / EARSHOT_WHISPER_DIR + EARSHOT_MODELS_DIR). They power Head A (grounding/briefing), the image-head vision oracle, and dub ASR. bin/fetch_substrate.ps1 downloads the auto-fetchable rows; 'manual' rows print instructions.

gguf.role: Head A retrieval embeddings (saved under the lowercase name the code expects)
earshot ASR model (dub head; earshot --model turbo)
image-head vision oracle (chat side). Custom quant from the KEEL substrate — copy from the operator's C:\models or source an equivalent Qwen3.5-9B GGUF + matching mmproj pair.
image-head vision oracle (mmproj pair for the model above). Must MATCH the vision model — copy from the operator's C:\models.

binaries.note: GitHub releases: https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases — take a recent cudart win-x64 build (dev box runs b9627). Unzip to C:\llama.cpp or set FERRYMAN_LLAMA_DIR.
GitHub releases: https://github.com/ggerganov/whisper.cpp/releases — win-x64 build (CPU build is fine; earshot is batch, not live). Unzip to C:\whisper.cpp or set EARSHOT_WHISPER_DIR.

Install ComfyUI Desktop (https://www.comfy.org/) — imagehead\start_comfyui.cmd drives its bundled backend headless on :8188 via %USERPROFILE%/%LOCALAPPDATA% (override COMFYUI_* envs). SDXL checkpoint sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors goes in its models\checkpoints.
winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS — HyperFrames renders via npx hyperframes@0.6.73 (first run fetches the package + headless Chromium: NETWORK REQUIRED once).
Required for EVERYTHING. gyan.dev or BtbN builds include h264_nvenc. doctor checks this.
